zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hubert de Moulton於大約1254年出生在英國諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德時，他的父親Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland30歲，母親Maude de Vaux31歲。他於大約1292年與Margaret du Bois結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1300年7月10日之前在英國波藍德。

zh-hans.Up Holland, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾武普 霍蘭

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hubert de Moulton于大约1254年出生在英国諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德时，他的父亲Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland30岁，母亲Maude de Vaux31岁。他于大约1292年与Margaret du Bois结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1300年7月10日之前在英国波藍德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: Hubert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was popular among the Normans, who introduced it to Britain, where it was later reinforced by settlers from the Low Countries. An 8th-century St Hubert succeeded St Lambert as bishop of Maastricht and is regarded as the patron of hunters, since, like St Eustace , he is supposed to have seen a vision of Christ crucified between the antlers of a stag.

variants.name: Hupprecht
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hubert de Moulton was born about 1254, in Gilsland, Northumberland, England, his father, Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland, was 30 and his mother, Maude de Vaux, was 31. He married Margaret du Bois about 1292. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died before 10 July 1300, in Cumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hubert de Moulton est né environ 1254, à Gilsland, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maude de Vaux, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margaret du Bois environ 1292. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé avant 10 juillet 1300, à Cumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hubert de Moulton um 1254 in Gilsland, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland 30 und seine Mutter Maude de Vaux 31. Er hat um 1292 Margaret du Bois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb vor 10. Juli 1300 in Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hubert de Moulton è nato il circa 1254 nel Gilsland, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Maude de Vaux, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Margaret du Bois circa 1292. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì prima del 10 luglio 1300, nel Cumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hubert de Moultonが約1254年にイギリスノースウンバーランドギルスランドで生まれた時，父Thomas de Moulton I of Gilslandは30歳，母Maude de Vauxは31歳であった。約1292年にMargaret du Boisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1300年7月10日以前にイギリスクウンバーランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hubert de Moulton(이)가 대략 1254년 영국 노르스벌랜드 길슬랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Maude de Vaux(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1292년 Margaret du Bois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1300년 7월 10일 이전 영국 c벌랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hubert de Moulton nasceu aproximadamente 1254, em Gilsland, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Maude de Vaux, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret du Bois aproximadamente 1292. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu antes 10 de julho de 1300, em Cumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hubert de Moulton родился около 1254 г. в местности джилсланд, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude de Vaux, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret du Bois около 1292 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер перед 10 июля 1300 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hubert de Moulton nació aproximadamente 1254, en Gilsland, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Maude de Vaux, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Margaret du Bois aproximadamente 1292. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió antes de 10 de julio de 1300, en Cumberland, Inglaterra.
